studyName: Joint Genome-Wide Gene Expression and GWAS Mapping in the MGS Dataset

variables.name: EA_PC_1
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 1 of 5; North-South)

variables.name: EA_PC_2
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 2 of 5; slight North-South)

variables.name: EA_PC_3
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 3 of 5; East-West)

variables.name: EA_PC_4
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 4 of 5; none)

variables.name: EA_PC_5
variables.description: EA PC (principal component 5 of 5; Ashkenazi)

variables.name: EBV_LOAD
variables.description: EBV load (viral load) of LCL

variables.name: EBV_TRANSFORMATION_SITE
variables.description: Site of EBV transformation to produce LCL

variables.name: PLINK_FID
variables.description: Family ID used in PLINK for dbGaP GWAS

variables.name: PLINK_IID
variables.description: Individual ID used in PLINK for dbGaP GWAS

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

variables.name: age
variables.description: Subject age

variables.name: race
variables.description: Race of participant

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type - all samples are RNA

variables.name: ATP_PER_CELL_COUNT
variables.description: ATP level adjusted by number of cells reflecting energy status of LCLs. Positive number with values from ATP average of duplicate luminescence readings from ATP assay, corrected for concentration of cells by dividing by cell count (see PMID: 23904455 for further details)

variables.name: BACKGROUND_INTENSITY
variables.description: Background intensity of that sample - used to generate the normalized expression values from the raw (non-normalized) expression values. Positive number with values from expression assay. Positive number with values from expression assay

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected - all are LCLs made from peripheral blood

variables.name: CELL_COUNT
variables.description: LCL cell count at harvest reflecting growth rate. Positive number with values from viable cell count at harvest x10 6 (24 hrs after 0.250 x 10^6 cells/ml) (see PMID: 23904455 for further details)

variables.name: EXPRESSION_ARRAY_BATCH
variables.description: Array batch (first or second) in which sample was run on expression array

variables.name: EXPRESSION_ARRAY_SERVICE
variables.description: Name of the service provider which ran the expression array

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID. Wave-tech-sample, namely growing wave number, technician surname initial, order in growing wave

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository. Also known as DNA_ID, the ID number assigned by the RUCDR to this subject's DNA specimens and LCLs (lymphoblastoid cell lines)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID. Also known as the GAIN/nonGAIN ID, this is the 5 digit ID you will find in GAIN and nonGAIN data (i.e., GWAS data deposited into dbGaP). GAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000021; nonGAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000167.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID_dbGaP_GWAS
variables.description: Name of dbGaP GWAS for subject

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate. All from RUCDR (Rutgers University Cell and DNA Repository)

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID. Wave-tech-sample, namely growing wave number, technician surname initial, order in growing wave

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate. All from RUCDR (Rutgers University Cell and DNA Repository)

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository. Also known as DNA_ID, the ID number assigned by the RUCDR to this subject's DNA specimens and LCLs (lymphoblastoid cell lines)

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID. Also known as the GAIN/nonGAIN ID, this is the 5 digit ID you will find in GAIN and nonGAIN data (i.e., GWAS data deposited into dbGaP). GAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000021; nonGAIN is dbGaP study ID phs000167.
